manual_units.label: Mudpaw

manual_units.label: Medic
manual_units.description: Manual healer unlocked when repair and sustain pressure become part of the run.

manual_units.label: Sapper
manual_units.description: Manual demolition unit for fortification pressure and choke-breaking.

manual_units.label: Saboteur
manual_units.description: Manual disruption unit for late full-grid pressure and subversion play.

pearl_specialists.label: Fisher
pearl_specialists.behavior: autonomously harvests fish within the assigned area

pearl_specialists.label: Logger
pearl_specialists.behavior: autonomously harvests logs within the assigned area

pearl_specialists.label: Digger
pearl_specialists.behavior: autonomously harvests rocks within the assigned area

pearl_specialists.label: Guard
pearl_specialists.behavior: autonomously handles infantry defense and offense within the assigned area

pearl_specialists.label: Ranger
pearl_specialists.behavior: autonomously provides ranged coverage within the assigned area

pearl_specialists.label: Bombardier
pearl_specialists.behavior: autonomously applies siege pressure to valuable targets within the assigned area

pearl_specialists.label: Shaman
pearl_specialists.behavior: autonomously heals wounded allies within the assigned area

pearl_specialists.label: Lookout
pearl_specialists.behavior: autonomously patrols and extends vision within the assigned area

radius_behavior_rules: player clicks terrain to place a specialist operating radius
specialist searches for role-valid work inside the assigned radius
specialist returns to the lodge or relevant dropoff flow automatically when needed
moving or reassigning the specialist replaces the previous operating radius
upgrade_philosophy: pearls unlock blueprints and specialist autonomy
specialists still cost in-match resources to train
radius growth is a primary specialist progression axis
specialist upgrades should improve capability rather than bypass baseline play

obsolete_assumptions: free match-start auto-deploy as the primary Pearl specialist model
separate baseline manual Gatherer Fighter and Scout units
Guardian and Hunter as the primary autonomous combat split
required baseline buildings or first-clear responses gated behind Clams
